events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Legend
angles.copy: 83 years young! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. Still got the moves, still got the voice.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with the ironically titled 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it, though?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring anthems like 'Live Forever' and 'Supersonic'.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. Which band would you have loved to see there?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, who would have been 91
events.blurb: August 16th marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley today, 49 years on. His music and legend live on.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55
events.blurb: September 1st marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Impact
angles.copy: 30 years since we lost a true voice of a generation. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his lasting impact on music and culture.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84
events.blurb: September 18th marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix today. His revolutionary guitar work changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The legendary frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Rebel
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the iconic Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll legend.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye's distinctive vocalist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: A Timeless Message
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A song whose message still resonates today.

events.title: The first iPod was unveiled 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: 25 years since the first iPod was unveiled! Remember the click wheel and 1,000 songs in your pocket?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond and what's the best Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: October 9th marks the birthday of The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon, who would have been 86 today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?
